parties.name: HANNONEN-GLADDEN, RISTO ROBERT 173A BELVEDERE STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94117

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-05-2005 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carl Salcedo.
Petitioner: Risto Hannonen-Gladden, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
Objections to the proposed change of name were made by Helena Hannonen in case #CNC 04-541672 (S.F. Superior Court)
Court findings: Petitioner's present name is Fred Robert Gladden Jr., not Risto Robert Hannonen-Gladden as stated on Petition for Chang of Name.
Petitioner's request for Change of Name is Denied without prejudice.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-19-2005 Reset To May-03-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Mitch Lyon.
Petitioner: Risto Robert Hannonen-Gladden, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
Matter is continued to May 3, 2005 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to submitt copy of birth certificate, driver lic., employement record, etc.
and bring original documents to court.
